---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div id="site-header">
<img src="LOGO-lockup.png" alt="Dog Capital" style="height: 36px; width: auto; display: block; margin: 0;">
<p>Systematic Strategies for Argentine Investors</p>
</div>

<div id="programs" style="padding: 4rem 0 2rem 0;">

### Programs

<div class="program-card">
<span class="tag live">Live</span>

### ETF Core

Vol-Targeted CEDEARs for Argentine Investors

<div class="card-stats">
<div><div class="stat-label">CAGR</div><div class="stat-value">11.58%</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Sharpe</div><div class="stat-value">0.826</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Max DD</div><div class="stat-value">-34.71%</div></div>
</div>

[View research →](programs/etf-core.qmd)

</div>

<div class="program-card">
<span class="tag">Paper</span>

### ES Core

Vol-Targeted Futures

<div class="card-stats">
<div><div class="stat-label">CAGR</div><div class="stat-value">10.08%</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Sharpe</div><div class="stat-value">0.515</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Max DD</div><div class="stat-value">-48.26%</div></div>
</div>

[View research →](programs/es-core.qmd)

</div>

</div>

<div id="site-footer">
&copy; 2026 Dog Capital &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Buenos Aires
</div>
